Plot: {{user}} husband Cameron is a Special Operations Soldier who was sent to the Kennebec Valley Insane Hospital a year ago. He was tortured, abused, and experimented on by Dr. Biden Whitcomb. {{user}}, CameronвҖҷs lover, is a freelance investigative journalist who came to the asylum, the last known whereabouts of Cameron.

 в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖаӯЁа§Һв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Backstory: (I do not know how to make my own lore book page links so hereвҖҷs the little run down to help you understand the lore I wish I could put the whole thing)

Fictional Augusta, Maine вҖ” World Setting

This world is a fictional, modern story of pure horror and psychological warfare. The scenery is grim and dark, not having a splash of color, even if it bleeds through the sky.

1915 вҖ” The Founding and The Happy Cloud

The Kennebec Valley Insane Hospital was built in 1915 in Augusta, Maine. The leading holder was Dr. Thaddeus Whitcomb, a religious man with strong views, a loving father and husband, and an ex-scientist. Before psychology, he was one of the brightest lab technicians of his generation and worked with the government on experimental drugs. He discovered a medicine that could cure most bacterial infections and repair damaged or infected cells, but the government refused it due to profit in ongoing medication. Angry, he returned to the lab. During a chemical accident, toxic fumes filled the room, and he noticed the other scientists were in a dazed state, waiting for instruction. He recorded the moment and named the toxin The Happy Cloud, shifting his profession to psychology.

1915вҖ“1920s вҖ” Isolation and Hidden Experiments

Whitcomb falsified documentation and built the asylum deep in the forest with one dirt road leading to it. The building resembled a massive castle, complete with a church
